howItWorksDesc: Food delivery in Skopje with FastlyGo is very easy! Your order at your door in just 3 steps
step1Desc: Enter your pickup and delivery addresses. You can select your location on the map or manually enter the address. The system automatically calculates the distance and finds the most suitable couriers for you.
step2Desc: Select delivery type (restaurant, market, individual), specify vehicle type and add your special instructions. You can get the most suitable service by specifying package size, weight and priority level.
step3Desc: Confirm your order and track your courier in real-time on the map. Receive notification when delivery is completed. You can message with the courier and see every stage of the delivery.
seeOnMap: See your courier on the map
getStartedDesc: Place your first food delivery order in Skopje and experience FastlyGo speed
aboutUsSubtitle: Two Friends, One Vision: Fast and Reliable Delivery for Everyone
aboutUsDesc: FastlyGo was born from a simple idea between two university friends in Skopje. What started as late-night conversations about improving food delivery in our city has grown into Macedonia\
ourStoryTitle: From University Friends to Business Partners
ourStoryDesc1: In 2015, Marko and Stefan were computer science students at Ss. Cyril and Methodius University in Skopje. Like many students, they often ordered food late at night while studying. They noticed the same problems every time: long wait times, no way to track orders, and unreliable delivery.
ourStoryDesc2: Marko and Stefan came together to solve these problems. While Marko focused on logistics and operations, Stefan developed a real-time tracking system and user-friendly mobile app. They made their first deliveries on their own bicycles - starting with just 5 couriers and 10 partner restaurants.
ourStoryDesc3: They started with just 5 couriers and 10 partner restaurants in Skopje. Today, FastlyGo serves the entire city with over 200 active couriers, 500+ business partners, and thousands of daily deliveries. But we\
founder1Bio: Computer Science graduate with a passion for logistics and technology. Marko handles operations, courier partnerships, and ensuring every delivery meets our quality standards.
ourTeamDesc: FastlyGo is powered by a dedicated team of logistics experts, software engineers, and customer service professionals. Together, we work every day to make delivery faster, smarter, and more reliable for everyone in Skopje.
missionDesc: To make every delivery an experience. We believe that fast, transparent, and reliable service should be accessible to everyone in Skopje and beyond.
valueSpeedDesc: Average 15-minute delivery time because your time matters.
valueTrustDesc: Every courier is verified, trained, and rated by real customers.
valueInnovationDesc: Real-time tracking, AI routing, and continuous improvements based on your feedback.
valueCommunityDesc: We support local restaurants, provide flexible jobs for couriers, and serve our neighbors.
joinTeamDesc: Whether you want to become a courier, partner your business with us, or join our tech team, we\
customerTestimonialsDesc: Real stories from real people who trust FastlyGo every day
testimonial1Text: FastlyGo has completely transformed how I run my restaurant! Orders arrive in under 15 minutes, and the couriers are incredibly professional. My customers are happier than ever, and I can focus on cooking instead of worrying about deliveries. This service is a game-changer!
testimonial2Text: As a pharmacy owner, reliability is everything. FastlyGo’s real-time tracking gives my customers peace of mind, and the delivery speed is unmatched. Since switching to FastlyGo, my customer satisfaction has skyrocketed. Highly recommend to any business owner!
testimonial3Text: Working as a FastlyGo courier has been the best decision I’ve made! The flexibility lets me balance work with my studies, and the earnings are fantastic. The support team is always there when I need help. I feel valued and respected every single day.
courierHeroDesc: Work with your own motorcycle or company motorcycle. Flexible hours, high earnings, weekly payment. You work, we support you!
secureWorkEnvironment: Secure and professional work environment. All our couriers are insured.
ownVehicleCheckbox: I have my own vehicle (+25% more earnings)

courierFlexibleHoursDesc: Work when you want, rest when you want. It\
courierInsuranceSupportDesc: Stay safe with health insurance and work accident insurance.
courierBonusSystemDesc: Make more deliveries, earn more bonuses. Performance rewards await you!
courierProfessionalTeamDesc: 24/7 support team, training programs and courier community.
courierCareerOpportunitiesDesc: Manager positions and career development for successful couriers.
whatCouriersSayDesc: Experiences from some of our thousands of happy couriers
courierTestimonial1: My life has changed since I started working with FastlyGo. Thanks to flexible hours, I can attend my classes at school and earn good money. The support team is always helpful and I feel truly valued.
courierTestimonial2: I've been a FastlyGo courier for a year and I love this job! Weekly payments are great, the bonus system is motivating. I work with my own motorcycle and my earnings are much better than I expected. I highly recommend it to everyone!
courierTestimonial3: I've been part of the FastlyGo family for 2 years. When I started, I was just working as a courier, now I've become a mentor for new couriers. The company really values its employees and offers career development. This is not just a job for me, it's a career!
faq1Q: What documents do I need to become a courier?
faq2Q: How long does the application process take?
faq2A: Your application is usually evaluated within 24-48 hours. You can start working immediately after approval.
faq3A: Payments are automatically deposited to your bank account every Friday. You receive your earnings from your first week.
faq4Q: Is there a minimum working hours requirement?
faq4A: No, you work completely flexibly. You can go online and receive deliveries whenever you want. But the more you work, the more you earn!
faq5Q: How much is deducted for the company motorcycle option?
faq5A: If you work with a company motorcycle, the fee per delivery is slightly lower (120 MKD), but fuel, maintenance and insurance costs belong to the company.
faq6A: Work accident insurance and health insurance are provided for all our couriers. Vehicle insurance is also included.
